O.definition: Openness reflects your curiosity, creativity, and appetite for new experiences — from exploring abstract ideas to appreciating art and unfamiliar cultures.

high.title: High in Openness
high.body: You are curious, imaginative, and open to new experiences. You enjoy exploring abstract ideas, art, and unconventional ways of living. You have a rich inner life and are drawn to novelty, whether it's traveling to new places or learning about different cultures.

low.title: Low in Openness
low.body: You prefer the familiar and the practical. You are down-to-earth, focusing on what's tangible and useful rather than abstract or speculative ideas. You like routine and tradition, and are more comfortable with tried-and-true approaches than experimental ones.

medium.title: Moderate Openness
medium.body: You have a well-rounded level of Openness to Experience. You're curious enough to explore new ideas but practical enough to stay grounded. You appreciate novelty without being easily distracted by every new trend, finding a comfortable middle ground between tradition and innovation.

high.title: High in Imagination
high.body: You have a vivid imagination and a rich inner world. You enjoy daydreaming, getting lost in stories, and exploring creative ideas. Your imagination is a source of creativity, though it may sometimes pull you away from the here and now.

low.title: Low in Imagination
low.body: You are practical and grounded, preferring concrete facts to fantasy. You focus on what's real and tangible rather than what's imaginary. Your thinking is direct and straightforward — you rarely get lost in daydreams.

medium.title: Moderate Imagination
medium.body: You have a moderate imagination. You can think creatively when a situation calls for it, but you don't get lost in daydreams or abstract fantasies. Your mind strikes a healthy balance between creativity and practicality.

high.title: High in Aesthetics
high.body: You have a deep appreciation for beauty in art, music, nature, and design. You are moved by visual and sensory experiences — a beautiful melody, a striking painting, or a well-designed space can genuinely affect your mood.

low.title: Low in Aesthetics
low.body: You are less concerned with beauty and artistic expression. You care more about function than form, and don't spend much time contemplating art or design. This simply means you direct your energy toward what matters most to you — a perfectly valid way to move through the world.

medium.title: Moderate Aesthetic Sensitivity
medium.body: You have a moderate appreciation for beauty and art. You can enjoy aesthetic experiences — a well-designed space, a beautiful landscape, or a moving piece of music — without being consumed by them. Beauty enhances your life, but it doesn't dominate your attention.

high.title: High in Feelings
high.body: You experience emotions deeply and are highly attuned to your inner emotional states. You are sensitive to subtle emotional cues in yourself and others, and may be deeply moved by music, films, and literature.

low.title: Low in Feelings
low.body: Your emotional responses are measured and controlled. You are not easily swept up by emotional experiences and tend to approach situations with rationality rather than sentiment. This helps you stay calm under pressure.

medium.title: Moderate Emotional Depth
medium.body: You have moderate emotional depth. You are aware of your feelings and can use them as useful information, but you don't let emotions dictate your decisions. You respond to situations with a balanced mix of heart and head.

high.title: High in Adventurousness
high.body: You crave novelty and variety. You love trying new things — exotic foods, unfamiliar places, and new activities. Routine bores you, and you're always looking for your next adventure, whether big or small.

low.title: Low in Adventurousness
low.body: You prefer familiarity and stability over novelty and change. You like knowing what to expect and stick with what works for you. Trying new things feels more stressful than exciting, and you find comfort in routine.

medium.title: Moderate Adventurousness
medium.body: You have a moderate sense of adventure. You're open to trying new things — a different cuisine, an unfamiliar destination — but you also value the comfort of familiar routines. You venture out when it feels right, not out of restlessness.

high.title: High in Intellect
high.body: You have a strong intellectual curiosity and enjoy engaging with complex ideas. You love philosophical discussions, theoretical debates, and learning for its own sake. Your mind is always active, exploring connections and asking 'why'.

low.title: Low in Intellect
low.body: You prefer practical, hands-on thinking over abstract intellectual pursuits. You're interested in how things work in the real world rather than theoretical debates. You'd rather learn a useful skill than explore abstract concepts.

medium.title: Moderate Intellectual Curiosity
medium.body: You have moderate intellectual curiosity. You enjoy learning and exploring ideas within your areas of interest, but you don't feel compelled to understand everything. Your curiosity is focused and purposeful rather than scattered.

high.title: High in Liberalism
high.body: You are open to challenging tradition and authority. You respect others' right to live differently and believe there's rarely one right answer. You tend to question established norms and think independently about moral and social issues.

low.title: Low in Liberalism
low.body: You respect tradition and established values. You believe certain principles shouldn't be easily discarded and that social stability matters more than radical change. You prefer clear guidelines and predictable ways of living.

medium.title: Moderate Openness to Values
medium.body: You have a moderate openness to different values and lifestyles. You respect others' choices and perspectives, while maintaining your own core beliefs. You're tolerant yet principled — open-minded without losing your own grounding.

C.definition: Conscientiousness captures your level of self-discipline, organization, and reliability — how you plan, follow through, and pursue your goals.

high.title: High in Conscientiousness
high.body: You are organized, disciplined, and reliable. You set high standards for yourself and work diligently to achieve your goals. Your self-control and ability to plan ahead help you succeed in school, work, and personal projects. Others see you as responsible and dependable.

low.title: Low in Conscientiousness
low.body: You prefer a spontaneous and flexible lifestyle. You dislike being tied down by strict schedules or rigid plans. While you may be seen as disorganized at times, your flexibility makes you adaptable to change and better at living in the moment.

medium.title: Moderate Conscientiousness
medium.body: You have a healthy mix of discipline and flexibility when it comes to Conscientiousness. You can be organized and focused when needed, but you also know when to be flexible and go with the flow. This adaptability lets you work hard without burning out.

high.title: High in Self-Efficacy
high.body: You have strong confidence in your ability to get things done. When faced with a challenge, you believe you can figure it out. This self-assurance helps you take initiative and persist through difficulties without being paralyzed by self-doubt.

low.title: Low in Self-Efficacy
low.body: You often doubt your abilities and may hesitate when facing new challenges. Even when you have the skills to succeed, you tend to second-guess yourself. This caution can make you more thorough, but it may also hold you back from seizing opportunities.

medium.title: Moderate Self-Efficacy
medium.body: You have a realistic sense of your own capabilities. You trust your abilities in familiar situations while remaining humble about new challenges. You back yourself when it counts, but you also prepare thoroughly rather than assuming success.

high.title: High in Orderliness
high.body: You value neatness, structure, and routine. Your workspace and living area are likely tidy and well-organized. You find comfort in order and may feel uneasy when things are out of place. Lists and schedules help you stay on top of things.

low.title: Low in Orderliness
low.body: You are not particularly concerned with neatness or organization. Your space may be messy, but you know where things are. You feel that too much structure can be stifling and prefer a more relaxed approach to order.

medium.title: Moderate Orderliness
medium.body: You have moderate orderliness. You appreciate some structure and organization in your life, but you don't need everything to be perfectly arranged. You can plan ahead when necessary and improvise when plans change, adapting without stress.

high.title: High in Dutifulness
high.body: You are highly reliable and take your commitments seriously. When you say you'll do something, you follow through. Others count on you because they know you keep your word. You have a strong sense of responsibility to others.

low.title: Low in Dutifulness
low.body: You value your freedom and don't like being tied down by obligations. You may change plans at the last minute or be less careful about keeping promises — not because you don't care, but because you prefer to keep your options open.

medium.title: Moderate Dutifulness
medium.body: You have a moderate sense of duty. You take your commitments seriously and generally keep your promises, but you also know when it's reasonable to reassess your priorities. People can count on you without you becoming over-extended.

high.title: High in Achievement-Striving
high.body: You are ambitious and driven to succeed. You set high goals for yourself and work hard to reach them. You take pride in your accomplishments and are always looking for ways to improve and do better.

low.title: Low in Achievement-Striving
low.body: You are content with meeting basic expectations and don't feel the need to constantly push for more. You value quality of life and personal satisfaction over climbing the ladder. This relaxed attitude helps you avoid burnout.

medium.title: Moderate Achievement Striving
medium.body: You have a moderate drive to achieve. You set goals and work toward them with steady effort, but you don't let ambition consume you. You value success while also appreciating the journey, finding satisfaction in progress rather than only in results.

high.title: High in Self-Discipline
high.body: You have strong willpower and can push through tasks even when they're boring or difficult. You resist distractions and stay focused on your goals. Your ability to delay gratification helps you achieve long-term objectives.

low.title: Low in Self-Discipline
low.body: You struggle with procrastination and find it hard to stick with tasks that don't interest you. You're easily distracted and may start many projects without finishing them. That said, your openness to starting things means you explore more possibilities than most — and when you do find the right spark, you can be remarkably productive.

medium.title: Moderate Self-Discipline
medium.body: You have moderate self-discipline. You can focus and push through challenging tasks when necessary, but you also allow yourself well-deserved breaks. You get things done without being rigid, balancing persistence with self-compassion.

high.title: High in Cautiousness
high.body: You think carefully before acting and consider all possible consequences. You prefer to play it safe rather than take unnecessary risks. While this prevents many mistakes, it can also lead to missed opportunities from overthinking.

low.title: Low in Cautiousness
low.body: You are spontaneous and act on impulse without overthinking. You trust your gut and are comfortable with risk. This makes you quick to act and seize opportunities, though sometimes you may wish you'd thought things through more carefully.

medium.title: Moderate Cautiousness
medium.body: You have moderate caution. You think before you act, weighing risks against rewards, but you don't get stuck in analysis paralysis. When the situation calls for a quick decision, you can trust your judgment and move forward.

E.definition: Extraversion describes where you draw your energy from — whether you thrive in lively social settings or recharge best in calm, quiet environments.

high.title: High in Extraversion
high.body: You are energetic, outgoing, and thrive in social settings. You enjoy being around people, making new friends, and being the center of attention. You tend to be positive and enthusiastic, bringing energy to group situations.

low.title: Low in Extraversion
low.body: You prefer quiet, low-key environments and find too much social stimulation draining rather than energizing. You value deeper one-on-one connections over large social circles. Your rich inner life sustains you, and you're selective about where you invest your social energy.

medium.title: Moderate Extraversion
medium.body: Your Extraversion sits comfortably in the middle range. You're at ease in social settings but also value your alone time. You can be outgoing when the situation calls for it, yet you don't depend on constant social stimulation.

high.title: High in Friendliness
high.body: You are warm and genuinely like people. You easily strike up conversations with strangers and make others feel welcome. Your warmth draws people to you and helps you build relationships quickly.

low.title: Low in Friendliness
low.body: You keep people at a distance and don't easily open up to others. You may come across as cool or formal, but this is just your natural style — you need time to build trust before showing your warm side.

medium.title: Moderate Friendliness
medium.body: You have moderate friendliness. You are warm and approachable when interacting with others, but you don't feel pressured to be everyone's best friend. You build genuine connections at your own pace, balancing openness with healthy boundaries.

high.title: High in Gregariousness
high.body: You love being around lots of people. Crowds energize you and you seek out social gatherings and parties. You dislike being alone for too long and thrive in bustling social environments.

low.title: Low in Gregariousness
low.body: You prefer solitude or small groups. Large social gatherings drain your energy and you need alone time to recharge. You'd much rather have a quiet conversation with a close friend than attend a loud party.

medium.title: Moderate Gregariousness
medium.body: You have a moderate social drive. You enjoy spending time with others — friends, colleagues, or social gatherings — but you also appreciate your own company. You can shift between social and solitary modes without either feeling draining.

high.title: High in Assertiveness
high.body: You are comfortable taking charge and expressing your opinions. You're not afraid to speak up, even in disagreement. In groups, you naturally step into leadership roles and drive conversations forward.

low.title: Low in Assertiveness
low.body: You prefer to stay in the background and let others take the lead. You don't enjoy voicing disagreement or pushing your opinions on others. You have plenty of ideas — you simply value harmony over confrontation, making you a calming presence in tense situations.

medium.title: Moderate Assertiveness
medium.body: You have moderate assertiveness. You speak up when your opinion matters and can take the lead when called upon, but you also listen and make space for others. Your voice carries weight without overpowering the room.

high.title: High in Activity Level
high.body: You are energetic and live life at a fast pace. You like to stay busy and have a hard time sitting still. Your high energy level allows you to accomplish a lot, but you may struggle with relaxation.

low.title: Low in Activity Level
low.body: You have a more relaxed pace of life. You don't like to rush and prefer to take things as they come. Your energy levels are moderate, and you're comfortable with leisure and downtime without feeling guilty.

medium.title: Moderate Activity Level
medium.body: You have a moderate activity level. You have enough energy to stay productive and engaged throughout the day, without feeling restless during quiet moments. You can keep a steady pace — busy when needed, relaxed when possible.

high.title: High in Excitement-Seeking
high.body: You crave excitement and thrill. You're drawn to adventure, whether it's extreme sports, travel, or a vibrant nightlife. Routine bores you and you need stimulation to feel alive. You're always up for something new and daring.

low.title: Low in Excitement-Seeking
low.body: You prefer a calm and predictable life without too much excitement. Thrill-seeking activities like skydiving or roller coasters hold little appeal for you. You're content with peaceful, low-stimulation activities — your satisfaction comes from steadiness, not adrenaline.

medium.title: Moderate Excitement Seeking
medium.body: You have a moderate appetite for excitement. You enjoy the occasional thrill — a fun adventure, a spontaneous trip — but you don't need constant stimulation to feel alive. You find satisfaction in a rhythm that mixes novelty with everyday steadiness.

high.title: High in Cheerfulness
high.body: You are naturally cheerful and optimistic. You laugh easily and find joy in everyday moments. Your positive outlook is contagious, and people around you often feel happier in your presence.

low.title: Low in Cheerfulness
low.body: You tend to be serious and reserved in your emotional expression. You're not easily excited and don't show overt happiness about small things. This doesn't mean you're unhappy — you just express positivity in more measured ways.

medium.title: Moderate Cheerfulness
medium.body: You have moderate cheerfulness. You generally maintain a positive outlook and can find silver linings in difficult situations, while still acknowledging when things are genuinely hard. Your optimism is grounded, not forced.

A.definition: Agreeableness measures your orientation toward others — how much you value cooperation, compassion, and maintaining harmonious relationships.

high.title: High in Agreeableness
high.body: You are compassionate, trusting, and cooperative. You value harmony in relationships and go out of your way to help others. People find you warm, kind, and easy to get along with. You believe the best in others and avoid unnecessary conflict.

low.title: Low in Agreeableness
low.body: You are more self-oriented and less concerned with pleasing others. You make decisions based on your own needs and aren't afraid of conflict. This assertiveness serves you well in competitive environments, though others may find you challenging to work with.

medium.title: Moderate Agreeableness
medium.body: Your Agreeableness falls in a well-adjusted middle zone. You care about others' feelings but also know how to stand your ground when necessary. You navigate cooperation and self-assertion with reasonable ease.

high.title: High in Trust
high.body: You tend to believe that people are basically honest and well-intentioned. You give others the benefit of the doubt and trust easily. This openness helps you form relationships quickly, though it may occasionally leave you vulnerable.

low.title: Low in Trust
low.body: You are skeptical of others' intentions and assume people may have hidden motives. You need time and evidence before trusting someone new. This cautiousness protects you from being taken advantage of, but can also keep genuine people at a distance.

medium.title: Moderate Trust
medium.body: You have a moderate level of trust. You give people the benefit of the doubt in most situations, while keeping reasonable caution in unfamiliar territory. You're open without being naive, letting trust build naturally over time.

high.title: High in Morality
high.body: You are straightforward and genuine in your dealings with others. You dislike manipulation and believe honesty is the best policy. You'd rather tell an uncomfortable truth than a comfortable lie.

low.title: Low in Morality
low.body: You are pragmatic and willing to bend rules when it serves your purpose. You don't believe all rules must be strictly followed, and see nothing wrong with the occasional white lie. This flexibility helps you navigate complex social situations.

medium.title: Moderate Morality
medium.body: You have a moderate moral compass. You're honest and principled in your dealings with others, but you also recognize that real-world situations sometimes call for nuance. You aim for integrity without being rigid, adapting to context while staying true to your values.

high.title: High in Altruism
high.body: You are generous and caring, with a strong desire to help those in need. You find satisfaction in giving your time and energy to others. When someone needs help, you're usually the first to offer.

low.title: Low in Altruism
low.body: You prioritize your own needs and are less inclined to sacrifice your time for others. You believe everyone should look after themselves first, and you help when it makes sense rather than out of obligation. This self-reliance means the help you do offer is intentional and meaningful.

medium.title: Moderate Altruism
medium.body: You have moderate altruism. You're willing to help others and contribute to the people around you, but you also protect your own time and energy. You give when you can, without burning yourself out in the process.

high.title: High in Cooperation
high.body: You are highly cooperative and avoid conflict whenever possible. You're willing to compromise and accommodate others' needs, even at your own expense. You're easy to work with, though you may struggle to assert yourself when it matters.

low.title: Low in Cooperation
low.body: You are competitive and stubborn. You stand your ground in disagreements and are not easily swayed. You don't mind conflict and will fight for your position rather than give in for the sake of harmony. This makes you formidable in negotiations.

medium.title: Moderate Cooperation
medium.body: You have a moderate tendency to cooperate. You work well with others, contributing to team efforts while maintaining your own perspective. You know when to compromise and when to stand firm — collaboration doesn't mean losing your voice.

high.title: High in Modesty
high.body: You are humble and unassuming. You don't boast about your achievements and prefer to let your actions speak for themselves. You have a realistic view of your abilities and don't need external validation.

low.title: Low in Modesty
low.body: You are confident in your abilities and aren't shy about letting others know. You believe in promoting yourself and see nothing wrong with being the center of attention. You know your worth and aren't afraid to show it.

medium.title: Moderate Modesty
medium.body: You have moderate modesty. You don't seek the spotlight or boast about achievements, but you also don't downplay your strengths. You're comfortable acknowledging what you're good at without needing to prove anything to anyone.

high.title: High in Sympathy
high.body: You are tender-hearted and deeply affected by others' suffering. You feel a strong urge to comfort those in pain and are easily moved by emotional stories. Your compassion makes you a caring and supportive friend.

low.title: Low in Sympathy
low.body: You are tough-minded and not easily moved by others' emotional distress. You make decisions based on logic rather than compassion. This level-headedness makes you a steady presence in a crisis — you offer clear thinking when emotions run high.

medium.title: Moderate Sympathy
medium.body: You have moderate sympathy. You can empathize with others' struggles and feel genuine concern for those in distress, without being overwhelmed by their emotions. Your compassion is present but measured — you care without losing yourself.

N.definition: Neuroticism reflects your sensitivity to negative emotions — how strongly you react to stress, and how quickly you recover from worry, frustration, or sadness.

high.title: High in Neuroticism
high.body: You are prone to experiencing negative emotions like anxiety, worry, anger, and sadness. You are sensitive to stress and may find everyday challenges overwhelming at times. However, this sensitivity also gives you deep emotional awareness and can be a wellspring of creativity.

low.title: Low in Neuroticism
low.body: You are emotionally stable and resilient. You stay calm under pressure and don't get easily upset by life's challenges. Your steady mood and positive outlook make you a source of stability for those around you.

medium.title: Moderate Emotional Stability
medium.body: You have a moderate level of Neuroticism. You experience normal ups and downs in your emotions, but you generally recover well from stress and setbacks. Your emotional responses are proportionate to situations.

high.title: High in Anxiety
high.body: You tend to feel tense and worried, even when there's no clear threat. Your mind constantly anticipates what could go wrong. This vigilance can help you prepare for risks, but more often it keeps you in a state of unnecessary stress.

low.title: Low in Anxiety
low.body: You rarely feel anxious or tense. You don't worry excessively about the future and trust that things will work out. You're generally relaxed and able to stay calm even in stressful situations.

medium.title: Moderate Anxiety
medium.body: Your anxiety levels are moderate. You worry about important matters — work deadlines, health, relationships — but these concerns don't dominate your daily life. You feel anxious when it makes sense and can usually let go once the situation resolves.

high.title: High in Anger
high.body: You are easily frustrated and quick to anger. When things don't go your way, your first reaction is often irritation. While your anger tends to pass quickly, it can be intense in the moment and affect your relationships.

low.title: Low in Anger
low.body: You are slow to anger and difficult to provoke. Even in frustrating situations, you remain patient and composed. You prefer to resolve conflicts calmly rather than react with anger. People find your even temper reassuring.

medium.title: Moderate Anger
medium.body: You are moderately prone to anger. You can express frustration when something genuinely bothers you, but you don't hold onto resentment or let irritation fester. Your anger is proportional — it rises when warranted and fades once addressed.

high.title: High in Depression
high.body: You are prone to feelings of sadness, guilt, and discouragement. You tend to dwell on past mistakes and can get stuck in gloomy moods. While this emotional depth can feel heavy, it also gives you a profound understanding of life's complexities.

low.title: Low in Depression
low.body: You rarely feel sad or discouraged. You don't dwell on past regrets and maintain a generally upbeat outlook. You recover quickly from setbacks and approach life with a light-hearted attitude.

medium.title: Moderate Depression
medium.body: Your lows are moderate and manageable. You experience occasional sadness or discouragement — especially after disappointments — but these feelings pass without lingering. You're resilient enough to recover quickly while still being honest about what hurts.

high.title: High in Self-Consciousness
high.body: You are highly aware of how others perceive you and may feel uncomfortable in social situations. You worry about saying the wrong thing or being judged. This sensitivity makes you considerate of others' feelings, but can also cause social anxiety.

low.title: Low in Self-Consciousness
low.body: You are socially confident and don't worry much about what others think of you. You're comfortable in your own skin and can be yourself in any situation. Social situations don't make you nervous, and you rarely feel embarrassed.

medium.title: Moderate Self-Consciousness
medium.body: You have moderate self-consciousness. You care about how you come across to others and want to make a good impression, but you don't obsess over it. You can be yourself in most social settings without undue worry about judgment.

high.title: High in Immoderation
high.body: You struggle with self-control and giving in to temptations. Whether it's food, shopping, or entertainment, you often act on impulse and regret it later. Resisting immediate gratification is a real challenge for you.

low.title: Low in Immoderation
low.body: You have strong self-control and are not easily swayed by impulses. You can delay gratification and make decisions based on long-term thinking rather than immediate desires. Your disciplined approach helps you avoid regretful choices.

medium.title: Moderate Immoderation
medium.body: You have moderate self-control. You occasionally give in to temptation — an impulse purchase, an extra dessert — but these moments don't derail your overall direction. You indulge in moderation without losing sight of your bigger goals.

high.title: High in Vulnerability
high.body: You struggle to cope with stress and pressure. When faced with emergencies or difficult situations, you may feel overwhelmed and unable to think clearly. Stress tends to affect you deeply, both emotionally and physically—but this sensitivity also means you're in tune with your limits and know when to seek support.

low.title: Low in Vulnerability
low.body: You handle stress and pressure with resilience. When faced with a crisis, you keep a cool head and find effective solutions. Challenges motivate rather than paralyze you, and you bounce back from setbacks quickly.

medium.title: Moderate Vulnerability to Stress
medium.body: You have moderate resilience to stress. You can handle everyday pressure and typical life challenges without falling apart, though intense crises may weigh on you. You cope well most of the time, and when stress builds up, you know when to step back and recover.
